title: Dataset Composition By Target And Site
objective: Quantify row counts and disease prevalence by cohort/site and target class.
method: Grouped the combined processed table by `source_site`, `num`, and `disease_binary`; visualized site-level class counts.
results: Combined table has 920 rows from 4 source sites.
Highest disease prevalence is University Hospital Zurich Switzerland at 93.50%; lowest is Hungarian Institute of Cardiology at 36.05%.
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
Large site-level prevalence differences make cohort-stratified validation important.
